Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xE013 "SWITCHBLADE-1000-E013" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Switchblade.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $1000 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. Sets up the correct VICII settings
Note: this allows the game to start more quickly than if we used the earlier entry point of $1254
